etymology_and_history.root_language: Language**: From "panic" from Greek "panikos" (of Pan, sudden fear)
etymology_and_history.original_meaning: Meaning**: Sudden fear of Pan; experiencing sudden overwhelming and panic sudden supported by calm awareness
etymology_and_history.semantic_evolution: Evolution**: Sudden Pan fear → sudden overwhelming → contemporary panic sudden and panic overwhelming that benefits from grounding growth
etymology_and_history.cultural_shifts: Shifts**: Sudden Pan fear → sudden overwhelming → panic sudden → grounding understanding
